failureReason: Measured 45.2mm exceeds upper limit 45.05mm by 0.15mm
what_was_wrong: Projector Lens Aperture Diameter CIRCLE on DIMENSIONS layer measured 45.2mm exceeds upper tolerance 45.05mm

lessonsLearned.rootCausePattern: CIRCLE dia on lens aperture drifts >0.1mm â€” mould tool wear pattern seen across 3 batches
correctiveActions: Mould tool inspected 2026-03-01
Tool replaced 2026-03-15
lessonsLearned.recommendation: Inspect mould tool every 500 cycles. Flag Projector Lens Aperture Diameter for priority monitoring on all VLS-001 drawings.

failureReason: True position deviation 0.08mm exceeds allowed 0.05mm â€” housing misaligned on vehicle body panel
what_was_wrong: Mounting Hole True Position TOLERANCE on GDT layer deviated 0.08mm exceeding 0.05mm limit

lessonsLearned.rootCausePattern: Fixture wear causing consistent 0.06-0.09mm positional drift on mounting holes
correctiveActions: Jig fixture recalibrated 2026-02-10
CMM verification added to inspection plan
lessonsLearned.recommendation: Recalibrate drilling fixture every 200 parts. Add CMM check for mounting hole position on first-off parts.

failureReason: LED Pocket Diameter 12.35mm exceeds upper limit 12.1mm â€” LED module will not seat correctly
what_was_wrong: LED Pocket Diameter CIRCLE on DIMENSIONS layer measured oversize causing LED module misfit

lessonsLearned.rootCausePattern: Injection mould core pin erosion on LED pocket feature â€” recurring on VLS-002 after 800+ cycles
correctiveActions: Core pin replaced 2026-01-20
Pocket diameter added to in-process SPC chart
lessonsLearned.recommendation: Replace core pin every 750 cycles. Monitor LED pocket diameter via SPC on every 10th shot.

failureReason: Reflector rim flatness 0.12mm exceeds 0.05mm limit â€” lens seal will fail causing moisture ingress
what_was_wrong: Reflector Face Flatness TOLERANCE on GDT layer exceeded limit causing seal failure risk

lessonsLearned.rootCausePattern: Springback in stamped reflector rim â€” insufficient hold time in press tool
correctiveActions: Press hold time increased from 2s to 4s on 2026-01-05
Flatness gauge added to 100% end-of-line check
lessonsLearned.recommendation: Maintain press hold time minimum 4 seconds. 100% flatness check on reflector rim before assembly.

failureReason: Mounting hole spacing 62.8mm below lower limit 62.9mm â€” non-interchangeable with mating body panel
what_was_wrong: Mounting Hole Spacing DIMENSION on DIMENSIONS layer below lower tolerance limit

lessonsLearned.rootCausePattern: DXF import scale error â€” drawing imported at 0.9969 factor instead of 1:1
correctiveActions: DXF import procedure updated to verify scale on 2025-12-10
Scale check added to drawing release checklist
lessonsLearned.recommendation: Always verify drawing scale is 1:1 after DXF import. Add scale verification step to AutoCAD plugin pre-check.

failureReason: Draft angle 0.8 deg below minimum 1.0 deg â€” part will stick in injection mould tool
what_was_wrong: Housing Wall Draft Angle LINE on DIMENSIONS layer below minimum causing mould ejection failure

lessonsLearned.rootCausePattern: Design engineer applied 0.5 deg draft from legacy drawing without checking Varroc mould standard
correctiveActions: Drawing corrected to 1.5 deg draft 2025-11-20
Draft angle check added to design review checklist
lessonsLearned.recommendation: Minimum 1.5 deg draft on all vertical walls. Add automated draft angle check to CAD validation rules.

failureReason: Vent port diameter 3.8mm below minimum 4.8mm â€” insufficient ventilation causes fogging inside lamp
what_was_wrong: Vent Port Diameter CIRCLE on DIMENSIONS layer undersized causing fogging failure per ECE_R7

lessonsLearned.rootCausePattern: Vent port blocked by flash from mould parting line â€” vent feature too close to parting line
correctiveActions: Vent port relocated 2mm away from parting line 2025-10-15
Visual check added for vent blockage at assembly
lessonsLearned.recommendation: Keep vent port minimum 3mm from mould parting line. Verify vent is unobstructed at assembly stage.

failureReason: Pivot bore perpendicularity 0.09mm exceeds 0.04mm â€” rocker arm cants on shaft causing edge loading
what_was_wrong: Pivot Bore Perpendicularity TOLERANCE on GDT layer exceeded limit causing rocker arm edge loading

lessonsLearned.rootCausePattern: Boring tool deflection on thin-wall section â€” feed rate too aggressive
correctiveActions: Feed rate reduced from 0.12 to 0.06 mm/rev on 2025-09-10
Perpendicularity added to first-off CMM report
lessonsLearned.recommendation: Use reduced feed rate 0.06mm/rev for pivot bore finishing pass. Include perpendicularity in CMM first-off.

failureReason: Focal length 28.5mm exceeds upper limit 27.5mm â€” beam focus point misses bulb filament
what_was_wrong: Focal Length ARC on DIMENSIONS layer out of tolerance causing beam focus miss on bulb

lessonsLearned.rootCausePattern: Parabola profile imported from incorrect revision of optical design file
correctiveActions: Optical design file version control enforced 2025-08-20
Focal length added to first-article inspection report
lessonsLearned.recommendation: Always cross-check parabola ARC against optical design file revision. Focal length must be in FAI report.

failureReason: Grommet cutout 18.5mm below minimum 19.7mm â€” grommet will not seat, water and dust ingress risk
what_was_wrong: Wiring Grommet Cutout Size LINE on DIMENSIONS layer undersized preventing grommet seating

lessonsLearned.rootCausePattern: Cutout dimension taken from old supplier grommet spec â€” grommet supplier changed but drawing not updated
correctiveActions: Drawing updated to new grommet spec 2025-07-15
Supplier change process now requires drawing review
lessonsLearned.recommendation: Verify grommet cutout against current supplier spec on every drawing revision. Link supplier part number to dimension.

failureReason: Title block revision field is empty â€” drawing released without revision identifier
what_was_wrong: MTEXT revision field in TITLEBLOCK layer empty on released drawing violating V-DWG-001

lessonsLearned.rootCausePattern: Engineers copying old drawing template that has blank revision field â€” template not updated
correctiveActions: Drawing template updated with mandatory revision field 2025-06-01
Plugin now flags empty title block fields before release
lessonsLearned.recommendation: AutoCAD plugin must reject drawing if revision field is blank. Update all drawing templates to Rev A default.

failureReason: Lens clip snap diameter 24.6mm below lower limit 24.85mm â€” lens will not clip securely, rattle in service
what_was_wrong: Lens Clip Snap Diameter CIRCLE on DIMENSIONS layer undersized causing lens retention failure

lessonsLearned.rootCausePattern: Mould shrinkage factor not applied to snap feature diameter â€” nominal used instead of compensated value
correctiveActions: Shrinkage compensation 1.006 applied to snap diameter 2025-05-10
Snap retention force test added to DVP
lessonsLearned.recommendation: Apply material shrinkage factor to all snap feature dimensions. Add snap retention force to DVP test plan.

failureReason: Tab perpendicularity 0.15mm exceeds 0.08mm â€” reflector tilts in housing causing beam aim deviation
what_was_wrong: Tab Perpendicularity TOLERANCE on GDT layer exceeded limit causing reflector tilt and beam aim failure

lessonsLearned.rootCausePattern: Bending die misalignment â€” lower die shifted 0.1mm causing consistent tab lean
correctiveActions: Bending die realigned and locked 2025-04-20
Tab perpendicularity added to press setup approval
lessonsLearned.recommendation: Check bending die alignment at every tool setup. Tab perpendicularity must be in press setup approval record.

failureReason: Oil feed hole 1.8mm below minimum 2.45mm â€” insufficient oil flow to pivot, seizure risk
what_was_wrong: Oil Feed Hole Diameter CIRCLE on DIMENSIONS layer undersized causing lubrication starvation to pivot

lessonsLearned.rootCausePattern: Drill bit worn below tolerance â€” diameter not checked between parts
correctiveActions: Drill bit replacement interval reduced to every 50 holes 2025-03-15
Go/no-go gauge added for oil feed hole
lessonsLearned.recommendation: Replace oil feed hole drill bit every 50 holes. Use go/no-go gauge on every part â€” no skip allowed.

failureReason: Lens seating lip width 1.8mm below minimum 2.3mm â€” lens seal fails, water ingress, ECE_R112 IP rating lost
what_was_wrong: Lens Seating Lip Width LINE on DIMENSIONS layer too narrow causing lens seal failure and IP rating loss

lessonsLearned.rootCausePattern: Lip width reduced in last design iteration to save weight â€” sealing consequence not evaluated
correctiveActions: Lip width restored to 2.5mm nominal 2025-02-20
Sealing surface dimensions flagged as safety-critical â€” change requires sign-off
lessonsLearned.recommendation: Lens seating lip width is safety-critical per ECE_R112. Mark as change-controlled dimension requiring dual sign-off.

failureReason: LED array pitch 5.35mm exceeds upper limit 5.1mm â€” LED spacing incorrect, uneven light distribution
what_was_wrong: LED Array Pitch DIMENSION on DIMENSIONS layer oversize causing uneven light distribution failing ECE_R7

lessonsLearned.rootCausePattern: PCB supplier used different pad pitch â€” procurement used alternate supplier without engineering approval
correctiveActions: PCB supplier qualification process updated 2025-01-10
LED pitch added to incoming inspection plan
lessonsLearned.recommendation: Any alternate PCB supplier requires engineering sign-off. LED pitch must be on incoming inspection checklist.

failureReason: Title block material field blank on machined part drawing â€” production cannot select correct stock
what_was_wrong: MTEXT material specification field in TITLEBLOCK layer empty on machined part drawing

lessonsLearned.rootCausePattern: Engineers forgetting to fill material field when creating new parts from existing drawing template
correctiveActions: Plugin now checks material field on all non-sheet-metal drawings 2024-12-05
Material field made mandatory in drawing release workflow
lessonsLearned.recommendation: AutoCAD plugin must flag blank material field as ERROR on machined and cast parts. Sheet metal drawings exempt.

failureReason: Bulb seat bore 15.25mm exceeds upper limit 15.05mm â€” bulb loose and miscentered, dim beam
what_was_wrong: Bulb Seat Bore Diameter CIRCLE on DIMENSIONS layer oversize causing bulb miscentering and beam failure

lessonsLearned.rootCausePattern: Boring bar thermal expansion during long production run â€” diameter drifts after 2 hours
correctiveActions: Warm-up cycle of 15 min added before production 2024-11-10
Bore diameter SPC chart monitored every 30 min
lessonsLearned.recommendation: Allow 15 min boring bar warm-up before production run. Check bulb seat bore every 30 min during production.

failureReason: Valve contact pad radius 4.2mm below minimum 4.9mm â€” point contact causes rapid pad wear
what_was_wrong: Valve Contact Pad Radius ARC on DIMENSIONS layer below minimum causing point contact and accelerated wear

lessonsLearned.rootCausePattern: Grinding wheel dressed to wrong radius â€” setup error not caught by operator
correctiveActions: Radius gauge added to grinding setup checklist 2024-10-05
First-off pad radius checked on CMM before batch release
lessonsLearned.recommendation: Grind wheel radius must be verified with radius gauge at every setup. CMM check on first-off part mandatory.

failureReason: Projector seating depth 22.8mm below lower limit 23.7mm â€” lens outside focal point, poor beam quality
what_was_wrong: Projector Seating Depth DIMENSION on DIMENSIONS layer too shallow placing lens outside focal point

lessonsLearned.rootCausePattern: Projector supplier changed lens stack thickness in last revision â€” housing drawing not updated to match
correctiveActions: Housing drawing updated to match new projector spec 2024-09-01
Projector-housing interface dimensions added to supplier change control
lessonsLearned.recommendation: Any projector supplier spec change must trigger housing drawing review. Seating depth is interface-critical â€” add to supplier change control list.
